login.title: Manage Psychological Evaluations Faster & Precisely.
login.subtitle: An integrated platform for individual psychological tests and mapping the potential of members in your organization.

registerIndividual.title: Start Your Self-Development Journey.
registerIndividual.subtitle: Join thousands of other professionals. Take validated psychological tests and discover your best potential.

registerOrganization.title: Build Your Company's Evaluation Ecosystem.
registerOrganization.subtitle: Manage members, assign psychological tests, and monitor your team's progress in one comprehensive centralized dashboard.

registerInvite.title: Collaborate with Your Team.
registerInvite.subtitle: Accept the invitation and start contributing to organizational evaluation and development in a centralized manner.
